details.test: Task 1: Cheapest adult rec 5v5 July tournament near Denver with deposit only
Task 2: Youth individual registration with early-bird under 120 at highest skill
Task 3: Save three fall youth tournaments near Chicago to Favorites
Task 4: Create 8-player adult team roster for Denver Night Hawks
Task 5: Cheapest City Cup package with jerseys and practice under 180 per player
Task 6: Change elite registration to cheapest non-elite adult division and 3-installment plan
Task 7: Sign up for two non-overlapping volunteer shifts after first game
Task 8: Adult May tournament registration with SAVE25 coupon under 600
Task 9: Purchase three protective gear items under 150 including Medium helmet
